content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong gap-up open across the board with global cues positive (US +1.46% to +2.02%). All 11 holdings are showing meaningful unrealized gains based on CMPs vs entry. Specialty chemicals, defense, IT mid-cap, FMCG, OMC, and metals all rallying — broad-based strength. Pre-market context: this is a momentum-friendly tape but caution warranted given several positions have catalysts within 3 sessions (HAL May 14, LUPIN/AUROPHARMA results, NEULANDLAB May 12). Priority is locking gains via SL trails on winners while respecting the 1% trail-gap discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Current stored SL 1048.89 is ABOVE CMP 1056.70 by only 0.7% — too tight, will stop on normal intraday wobble. Trail to 1035 (S1 pivot, ~2% below CMP) which respects the 1.0% trail-gap floor and locks in +5.2% gain. Bullish thesis intact: AAA upgrade catalyst, Q4 PAT +19.2%, GNPA <1%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8% (basically flat). Tightening SL from 119 to 121 reduces risk on a position that's not moving. Gold ETF as defensive ballast; structural Fed rate-cut thesis intact but near-term momentum cooled. SL gap 2.5% below CMP — within trail discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1730.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. Stored SL 1730 already at breakeven+; CMP 1757 leaves only 1.5% gap — within tolerance, no change needed. New_stop_loss=current=1730, new_target=1800=current — this is a NO-OP. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. SL at 4575 (entry/breakeven). Q4 results May 14 — binary catalyst within ~5 sessions; per Rule 11, position is acceptable since SL already at breakeven and event is >3 sessions out. Will reassess closer to event. Hold structure: SL 4575 is 1.2% below CMP — within trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Stored SL 6960 — checking: 6960 vs CMP 7049 leaves only 1.3% gap which is within floor. But SL 6960 is ABOVE entry 6900 — already at breakeven+. New_stop_loss 6900 would LOOSEN — guardrail will reject. Switching to HOLD; current 6960 SL is fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL at entry 838 — 0.9% below CMP (just at floor). Q4 results imminent in May (binary risk). Holding with SL at breakeven; will revisit on a sharper move. Cannot tighten further without violating 1% trail-gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 362.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = -0.1% (flat). Stored SL 362 = 1.8% below CMP. Q4 PAT +30.6%, strong AUM growth. NO-OP MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL at 818 (just below entry). Q4 PAT +18%, record high. SL 0.6% below CMP — already tight. Cannot tighten without violating trail-gap floor. Hold to let target work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. SL at 1265 (above entry, breakeven+). Q4 PAT >100%, Encora deal closed, 10% upper circuit. SL 1265 is 1.1% below CMP — at floor. Cannot tighten further. Hold for target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 2980 = 1.8% below CMP. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA margin expansion, defense capex tailwind. SL gap healthy. Hold for target 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Stored SL 790 = 2.1% below CMP. Tighten to 798 (1.2% below CMP, locks in near-breakeven). Q4 record revenue, EBITDA margin 46.5%, +20% in a month."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1048.89 is dangerously above CMP 1056.70 (only 0.7% gap, within self-stopout zone). Lower to 1035 (2.0% below CMP) — still locks +5.2% gain vs entry 984."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening from 119 to 121 reduces downside on flat position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1730 already at breakeven+, 1.5% below CMP. Healthy trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 4575, May 14 results in ~5 sessions — will reassess as event approaches."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 already above entry 6900, 1.3% below CMP — at trail floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 838, 0.9% below CMP. Q4 imminent — cannot tighten without forced exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 362 is 1.8% below CMP, healthy trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 818 is 0.6% below CMP — already at/below floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 above entry 1259, 1.1% below CMP. At trail floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2980 = 1.8% below CMP, healthy gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 790 to 798 (1.2% below CMP) to reduce downside given +20% recent run."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VEDL +7.18% post-demerger 17% rally, NEULANDLAB +4.89% (May 12 results — binary), SRF +6.85% post Q4, GRSE/COFORGE already held. HINDPETRO bearish research overhang (-21% 6m, marketing margin pressure) — pass. AUROPHARMA/LUPIN/BIOCON/DABUR all reporting today — binary, avoid fresh entries (Rule 11). MARKET_PULSE bias was momentum chase but the book is already 11 positions deep with multiple binary catalysts in next 1-2 weeks; no need to add concentration risk.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed across 11 names with strong gap-up showing unrealized gains across the board. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.7% — the priority now is risk discipline and capital preservation, NOT new entries. HFCL OPEN order from prior session still pending (1703 min ago) — leaving alone, will reassess after open. Cluster check: TITAGARH+GRSE+HAL = 3 capital goods/defense names; ABCAPITAL+PNBHOUSING+CAMS = 3 financial services. Both clusters near limit — NO new adds in either cluster today. HAL has May 14 results (5 sessions out, just within Rule 11 buffer); will tighten before event. Today's discipline: trail SLs on the runners, no new entries, let the book work."
}
